    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Method Create

    Create(params float[])

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from a weights collection. If there's more than 8 non zero values, the 8 most representative values are taken.

    Declaration
    public static SparseWeight8 Create(params float[] weights)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    float[] weights

    A sequence of weight values.
    Returns
    Type Description
    SparseWeight8

    A SparseWeight8 instance.

    Create(IEnumerable<float>)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from a weights collection. If there's more than 8 weighted values, the 8 heaviest values are taken.

    Declaration
    public static SparseWeight8 Create(IEnumerable<float> weights)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    IEnumerable<float> weights

    A sequence of weight values.
    Returns
    Type Description
    SparseWeight8

    A SparseWeight8 instance.

    Create(params (int Index, float Weight)[])

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from an indexed weight collection. If there's more than 8 weighted values, the 8 heaviest values are taken.

    Declaration
    public static SparseWeight8 Create(params (int Index, float Weight)[] indexedWeights)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    (int JointIndex, float Weight)[] indexedWeights

    A sequence of indexed weight pairs.
    Returns
    Type Description
    SparseWeight8

    A SparseWeight8 instance.

    Create(IEnumerable<(int Index, float Weight)>)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from an indexed weight collection. If there's more than 8 weighted values, the 8 heaviest values are taken.

    Declaration

    Parameters

    IEnumerable<(int Index, float Weight)> indexedWeights

    A sequence of indexed weight pairs.

    Create(in Vector4, in Vector4)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 struct.

    Declaration
    public static SparseWeight8 Create(in Vector4 idx0123, in Vector4 wgt0123)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Vector4 idx0123

    The indices of weights 0 to 3.
    Vector4 wgt0123

    The weights of indices 0 to 3.
    Returns
    Type Description
    SparseWeight8

    A SparseWeight8 instance.
    Remarks

    Repeating indices will have their weights merged.

    Create(in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 struct.

    Declaration
    public static SparseWeight8 Create(in Vector4 idx0123, in Vector4 idx4567, in Vector4 wgt0123, in Vector4 wgt4567)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Vector4 idx0123

    The first 4 indices.
    Vector4 idx4567

    The next 4 indices.
    Vector4 wgt0123

    The first 4 weights.
    Vector4 wgt4567

    The next 4 weights.
    Returns
    Type Description
    SparseWeight8

    A SparseWeight8 instance.
    Remarks

    Repeating indices will have their weights merged.
